# Milady Cloud Documentation

This is an LLM-friendly index of the Milady Cloud docs (for tools like Cursor, ChatGPT, etc.).

Base URL: https://cloud.milady.ai
Docs root: https://cloud.milady.ai/docs
llms.txt: https://cloud.milady.ai/.well-known/llms.txt
llms-full.txt: https://cloud.milady.ai/.well-known/llms-full.txt

## Pages

- elizaOS Cloud Documentation — Build, deploy, and scale intelligent AI agents with elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs
- A2A Protocol — Agent-to-Agent communication protocol on elizaOS Cloud. Enable agents to communicate and collaborate.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/a2a
- Agent Creator — Build AI agents visually with the elizaOS Cloud Agent Creator. No code required to create powerful conversational agents.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/agent-creator
- AI Agents — Create, deploy, and manage intelligent AI agents on elizaOS Cloud. Build conversational agents with custom personalities, knowledge, and capabilities.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/agents
- API Overview — Complete REST API reference for elizaOS Cloud. OpenAI-compatible endpoints for chat, embeddings, and more.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api
- Agents — Create and manage AI agents on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/agents
- API Keys — Manage API keys for elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/api-keys
- Apps — Create and manage applications on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/apps
- Chat Completions — OpenAI-compatible chat completions API with streaming support for elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/chat
- Containers — Deploy and manage containers on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/containers
- Credits & Billing — Manage credits and billing on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/credits
- Embeddings — Generate vector embeddings for text using elizaOS Cloud embedding API.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/embeddings
- Gallery — Store and manage generated media on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/gallery
- Image Generation — Generate images from text prompts using elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/images
- Knowledge — Upload and query documents for RAG on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/knowledge
- MCPs — Model Context Protocol servers on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/mcps
- Messages — Anthropic Messages API-compatible endpoint for Claude Code and Anthropic SDK clients.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/messages
- Models — List and discover available AI models on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/models
- API Explorer — Browse every public Cloud API route (mostly under /api/v1) with a full left-side explorer and OpenAPI-friendly paths.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/overview
- Redemptions — Redeem earnings on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/redemptions
- Video Generation — Generate videos from text prompts using elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/video
- Voice & TTS — Text-to-speech and voice cloning on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/api/voice
- App Domains — Configure custom domains for your multi-tenant applications on elizaOS Cloud. Add wildcard subdomains and bring your own custom domains.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/app-domains
- Apps — Create and manage applications on elizaOS Cloud. Build integrations with your agents and APIs.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/apps
- Authentication — Learn how to authenticate with elizaOS Cloud APIs using API keys, session tokens, wallet signatures (SIWE and per-request), and x402 payments.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/authentication
- Billing & Credits — Understand elizaOS Cloud pricing, credits system, and billing management.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/billing
- Build AI Agents Faster. Ship Them Instantly. Introducing Eliza Cloud. — Eliza Cloud is a low-code platform for building and deploying AI agents. Focus on what your agent does - we handle everything else.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/blog/introducing-eliza-cloud
- Changelog — Latest updates, new features, and improvements to elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/changelog
- Character JSON — Complete reference for elizaOS character JSON configuration. Define agent personality, behavior, and settings.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/character-json
- Containers — Deploy custom Docker containers on elizaOS Cloud with managed infrastructure and auto-scaling.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/containers
- Earnings — Monetize your agents and apps on elizaOS Cloud. Earn from usage and marketplace listings.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/earnings
- Error Handling — Understand elizaOS Cloud API errors and how to handle them gracefully in your applications.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/errors
- Gallery — Manage your generated images and videos in the elizaOS Cloud Gallery.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/gallery
- Image Generation — Generate images with AI on elizaOS Cloud using Google Gemini, OpenAI, and other models.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/image-generation
- Installation — Install the elizaOS SDK and CLI tools for local development.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/installation
- Knowledge Base — Add documents to your agents' knowledge base for RAG-powered responses on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/knowledge
- MCP Protocol — Model Context Protocol implementation on elizaOS Cloud. Connect tools and resources to AI models.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/mcp
- MCP Integration — Connect Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to your agents on elizaOS Cloud for extended capabilities.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/mcps
- Quickstart — Get started with elizaOS Cloud in 5 minutes. Deploy your first AI agent and start building.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/quickstart
- Rate Limits — Understand rate limiting on elizaOS Cloud APIs and how to handle rate limit errors.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/rate-limits
- SDKs & Libraries — Official and community SDKs for integrating with elizaOS Cloud in your preferred language.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/sdks
- Video Generation — Generate AI videos from text prompts on elizaOS Cloud using Google Veo, Kling, and MiniMax video models.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/video-generation
- Voice Cloning — Clone voices and generate speech with ElevenLabs integration on elizaOS Cloud.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/voice-cloning
- Wallet API — Authenticate and sign up with an Ethereum wallet using SIWE (EIP-4361) or per-request wallet header signature. Get API keys or sign each request without storing a key.
  https://cloud.milady.ai/docs/wallet-api
